creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: tcberner
Date: Sat Apr 25 18:22:18 UTC 2020
New revision: 532968
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/532968

Log:
  x11-wm/herbstluftwm: Update to 0.8.1

  - this fixes a segfault on start introduced in 0.8.0

  Changelog: https://herbstluftwm.org/news.html
  - the frame index e refers to the first empty frame
  - new setting hide_covered_windows to improve the appearance when used with a
    compositor
  - keybind now checks that the bound command exists
  - bug fixes

  PR:		245779
  Submitted by:	Zsolt Udvari <uzsolt@uzsolt.hu>  (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/Makefile
  head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/distinfo
  head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/files/patch-CMakeLists.txt
  head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/files/patch-src_completion.cpp
  head/x11-wm/herbstluftwm/pkg-plist
